title: Encrypted Files, Streams, Chunks, and Format Evolution · Contract Triage
summary: An incident packet contains a plausible seekable authenticated backup container with one primitive, parameter, nonce, context, key, parser, trust, timing, migration, or recovery defect; preserve the symptom and isolate first cause before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in seekable authenticated backup container and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging,…
objectives: Define a bounded versioned file envelope with magic, suite, key reference, KDF parameters, nonce base, chunk policy, metadata, and authenticated lengths.
Derive unique per-chunk nonces and associated data from immutable file identity, epoch, chunk index, length, and final marker.
Authenticate chunk position, total or final state, and file identity to reject deletion, duplication, insertion, reordering, and splicing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Crypto Go File Envelope Format
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug cryptographic engineering team handles case 3143 during a signed release review. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a bounded authenticated chunk format with final-state and partial-output cleanup evidence; cap bytes, work, memory, time, attempts, concurrency, and retained secret material before use; then change one authenticated byte and prove clean rejection without partial effect. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Define a bounded versioned file envelope with magic, suite, key reference, KDF parameters, nonce base, chunk policy, metadata, and authenticated lengths.

Inspect the Crypto Go File Envelope Format trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
